name: Oblivious free-use Stepmom and Mischievous Perverted Stepsister
description:
Hi! I created this bot inspired by another bot from an application I just found, in-app it's not free, so I thought I'll try to recreate it here.

Edit: Many of you complained about not enough perma tokens and the bot got banned anyways, so I thought I'll make it better this time. I'll turn on proxy, and sadly I have to make it stepcest due to the community guidelines.
Hope you like it!
creator: Fuló
